targets.rawSql: SELECT last_updated AS "time", 'Frost Hovin' AS metric, (value::text)::float AS temp FROM events WHERE feature = 'weather' AND state_name = 'air_temperature' AND device_id = 'SN18210' AND $__timeFilter(last_updated) ORDER BY 1

SELECT last_updated AS "time", COALESCE(device_name, device_id) AS metric, (value::text)::float AS temp FROM events WHERE feature = 'temperature' AND state_name = 'temperature' AND $__timeFilter(last_updated) ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_bin('30 minutes', received_at, TIMESTAMPTZ '2000-01-01') AS "time", 'Netatmo median (<200m)' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY (value::text)::float) AS temp FROM events WHERE source = 'netatmo' AND state_name = 'air_temperature' AND COALESCE(substring(device_name from 'Netatmo ([0-9]+)m')::int, 99999) <= 200 AND $__timeFilter(received_at) GROUP BY 1 HAVING count(DISTINCT device_id) >= 3 ORDER BY 1

SELECT last_updated AS "time", 'Sol (W/m²)' AS metric, (value::text)::float AS v FROM events WHERE feature = 'weather' AND state_name = 'global_radiation' AND device_id = 'SN18700' AND $__timeFilter(last_updated) ORDER BY 1

SELECT last_updated AS "time", 'Vind (m/s)' AS metric, (value::text)::float AS v FROM events WHERE feature = 'weather' AND state_name = 'wind_speed' AND device_id = 'SN18210' AND $__timeFilter(last_updated) ORDER BY 1

SELECT last_updated AS "time", 'Nedbør (mm/t)' AS metric, (value::text)::float AS v FROM events WHERE feature = 'weather' AND state_name = 'precipitation' AND device_id = 'SN18210' AND $__timeFilter(last_updated) ORDER BY 1
